transcript: Speaker A: Most people can read in English, but when a native speaker speaks fast, they don't understand. It's not your fault. Real conversations are fast and full of emotion. That's where I come in. I'm Loora, your AI English tutor. We'll practice listening and speaking together everyday, just like you would with a real person. I'll help you get used to real speed, correct your pronunciation, and guide you through mistakes gently. No stress, no pressure. Just natural English that gets better everyday. And in just three weeks, you'll start understanding everything people say and speaking with real confidence.
on_screen_text: most people can read in English but when a native speaker speaks fast they don't understand it's not your fault real conversations are fast and full of emotion that's where I come in I'm Loora your AI English tutor will practice listening and speaking together everyday just like you would with a real person I'll help you get used to real speed correct your pronunciation and guide you through mistakes gently no stress no pressure just natural English that gets better everyday and in just 3 weeks you'll start understanding everything people say and speaking with real confidence
summary: An AI avatar introduces Loora, an AI English tutoring app designed to help users understand fast-talking native speakers. The app offers daily conversational practice to improve pronunciation and build speaking confidence within three weeks.
